Corrections made for beam attenuation, attenuation of
with gamma energy being 7% at 4.4 MeV and better at
varies from 1% for light elements to 5% for Pu-239.
Total uncertainty is about 10% in most cases, with
additional uncertainties for those gamma rays with
differential cross section less than 3 mb/sr, gamma
rays with energy greater than 5 mev, and two or more
gamma rays that cannot be separated cleanly.
